wph_comparability.attribution: Three DIFFERENT quantities: the engine's raw CSP solution-space upper bound (hard pins + surviving COMPAT edges only); WP-H's operational ambiguity (channel-quality-weighted G-surface, many soft channels); WP-H's gauge-quotient equivalence-class lower bound. The engine bound sits between them by construction: soft channels absent -> larger than operational; hard pins fix 38 signs -> smaller than the unpinned gauge count 163*log10(67)=297.7.

no_value_claim: No phonetic value is asserted. Cells using M_HOM_CONT are conditional maps under the UNLICENSED continuity hypothesis.
